title: Monkey Memory Game
description: When visiting the Indianapolis zoo this past summer, I was inspired to recreate a Monkey Memory Game. I would like to take the knowledge I have learned about Django in the past year to setup as the backend and using a modern frontend framework, like React or Angular, as the frontend. There will be a login feature, and will use Chart.js to display the average score for each user. Checkout my progess on GitHub.

title: Fictional University
description: Creating a custom Wordpress Template for a fictional university. Taking my first steps in relearning PHP and familiarizing myself with Wordpress. I am following a UDemy Course called 'How to create a custom Wordpress Template' by Someone's Name.

title: Profolio Website 2025
description: Recreating my portfolio website in 2025. Told some time to brainstorm in Figma of how I would like to set up my portfolio, which you can view below. Relearning how to use Prepors (SCSS compling software) and React. Taking some first steps to get inspired and work on my own personal development again.

title: SkyAlert - Weather App
description: Weather forecast app using OpenWeatherMap API. Asks for users location to give weather forecast in that location. Users can search for weather in any city. Can change from Celcius to Fahrenheit, see 3 days of upcoming forecast, UV Index, wind speed, humidity and more. Would like to impliment more features in the future.

title: Profolio Website 2023
description: My old profolio site hosted on gitHub.

title: Child Life Zone
description: Developed a vibrant and user-friendly application tailored for the Child Life Zone at Riley Children's Hospital. Prioritized simplicity, colorfulness, and fun in the design to cater to its young users helping to descover what CLZ has to offer. Utilized Adobe XD, Illustrator, HTML, CSS, SCSS, and JavaScript to create user interface and design.

title: College GitHub Repos
